rows.label: qev010901_SEL0011
rows.name:
Check the situation to
see what happened.

rows.label: qev010901_MSG0003
rows.name:
Honestly, things are looking
pretty bad, but... Right now,
NLA is more important than me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010901_MSG0005
rows.name:
The monsters you let go a long
time ago, [ST:playername ]-san... The Zuusu kids![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010901_MSG0006
rows.name:
Those kids grew into adults
and started attacking BLADEs
left and right... Me too...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010901_MSG0007
rows.name:
We shouldn't have let them go...
Even if we felt sorry for them, we
should have killed them back then![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010901_MSG0008
rows.name:
At this rate, because of our decision, a
lot of people are going to get hurt...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010901_MSG0009
rows.name:
Please... you have to...
you have to defeat them...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010901_MSG0010
rows.name:
They seem to still be in that
nest... north of the West Gate...[ST:wait ]
